sentences.sentence: Educating Psyche by Bernie Neville is a book which looks at radical new approaches to learning, describing the effects of emotion, imagination and the unconscious on learning.
sentences.translation: 伯尼·内维尔的《教育心灵》探讨学习的新激进方法，描述情感、想象和无意识对学习的影响。

structure.text: Educating Psyche by Bernie Neville
is a book which looks at radical new approaches to learning
which looks at radical new approaches to learning
describing the effects of emotion, imagination and the unconscious on learning

difficult_points: which 定语从句修饰 book。
describing 分词短语补充说明书的内容。

sentences.sentence: One theory discussed in the book is that proposed by George Lozanov, which focuses on the power of suggestion.
sentences.translation: 书中讨论的一种理论是乔治·洛扎诺夫提出的理论，它关注暗示的力量。

structure.text: One theory discussed in the book
discussed in the book
is that proposed by George Lozanov
which focuses on the power of suggestion

difficult_points: discussed 和 proposed 都是过去分词作定语。
which 指前面的 theory。

sentences.sentence: Lozanov's instructional technique is based on the evidence that the connections made in the brain through unconscious processing (which he calls non-specific mental reactivity) are more durable than those made through conscious processing.
sentences.translation: 洛扎诺夫的教学技巧基于这样一个证据：通过无意识处理在大脑中形成的连接，比通过有意识处理形成的连接更持久。

structure.text: Lozanov's instructional technique

is based on the evidence that the connections made in the brain through unconscious processing (which he calls non-specific mental reactivity) are more durable than those made through conscious processing
which he calls non-specific mental reactivity
those made through conscious processing

difficult_points: that 从句说明 evidence 内容。
which 指 unconscious processing，并非 connections。
those 代替前面的 connections。

sentences.sentence: Besides the laboratory evidence for this, we know from our experience that we often remember what we have perceived peripherally, long after we have forgotten what we set out to learn.
sentences.translation: 除了这方面的实验室证据外，我们从经验知道，常常在忘记原本要学的内容很久之后，仍记得周边感知到的东西。

structure.text: Besides the laboratory evidence for this
we know from our experience
that we often remember what we have perceived peripherally
long after we have forgotten what we set out to learn

difficult_points: know 后接 that 从句，内部又有 what 从句。
long after 引导时间从句，what we set out to learn 是 forgotten 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: If we think of a book we studied months or years ago, we will find it easier to recall peripheral details—the colour, the binding, the typeface, the table at the library where we sat while studying it—than the content on which we were concentrating.
sentences.translation: 如果想想几个月或几年前读过的一本书，我们会发现，回忆周边细节比回忆当时专注的内容更容易。

structure.text: If we think of a book we studied months or years ago
we will find it easier to recall peripheral details—the colour, the binding, the typeface, the table at the library where we sat while studying it—than the content on which we were concentrating
we studied months or years ago
where we sat while studying it
on which we were concentrating

difficult_points: if 条件句中 book 后省略关系代词。
find it easier 是形式宾语结构，than 比较两种记忆对象。
where 和 on which 分别修饰 table 和 content。

sentences.sentence: If we think of a lecture we listened to with great concentration, we will recall the lecturer's appearance and mannerisms, our place in the auditorium, the failure of the air-conditioning, much more easily than the ideas we went to learn.
sentences.translation: 如果想想一次我们高度专注听过的讲座，我们会发现，比起专门去学习的思想内容，更容易回忆起讲师的外貌举止、座位以及空调故障。

structure.text: If we think of a lecture we listened to with great concentration
we will recall the lecturer's appearance and mannerisms, our place in the auditorium, the failure of the air-conditioning, much more easily than the ideas we went to learn
we listened to with great concentration
the ideas we went to learn

difficult_points: lecture 后省略关系代词。
went to learn 表示去讲座的目的。
than 后比较的是 ideas。

sentences.sentence: Even if these peripheral details are a bit elusive, they come back readily in hypnosis or when we relive the event imaginatively, as in psychodrama.
sentences.translation: 即使这些周边细节有些难以捉摸，在催眠状态或像心理剧那样想象性重现事件时，它们也很容易回来。

structure.text: Even if these peripheral details are a bit elusive
they come back readily in hypnosis or when we relive the event imaginatively
when we relive the event imaginatively
as in psychodrama

difficult_points: even if 引导让步从句。
come back 表示记忆重新出现，when 从句说明情境。

sentences.sentence: The details of the content of the lecture, on the other hand, seem to have gone forever.
sentences.translation: 另一方面，讲座内容的细节似乎永远消失了。

structure.text: The details of the content of the lecture
on the other hand
seem to have gone forever

difficult_points: on the other hand 表示与周边细节的对比。
seem to have gone 是完成时不定式，表示似乎已经消失。

sentences.sentence: This phenomenon can be partly attributed to the common counterproductive approach to study (making extreme efforts to memorise, tensing muscles, inducing fatigue), but it also simply reflects the way the brain functions.
sentences.translation: 这种现象部分可归因于常见但适得其反的学习方法（极力记忆、绷紧肌肉、造成疲劳），但也只是反映大脑的运作方式。

structure.text: This phenomenon can be partly attributed to the common counterproductive approach to study
making extreme efforts to memorise, tensing muscles, inducing fatigue
but it also simply reflects the way the brain functions

difficult_points: be attributed to 表示归因于。
括号内列举 counterproductive 方法。
the way the brain functions 表示大脑运作方式。

sentences.sentence: Lozanov therefore made indirect instruction (suggestion) central to his teaching system.
sentences.translation: 因此，洛扎诺夫把间接教学（暗示）置于教学体系的核心。

structure.text: Lozanov
therefore made indirect instruction (suggestion) central to his teaching system

difficult_points: make A central to B 是使役结构，表示使 A 成为 B 的核心。
suggestion 是 indirect instruction 的同位说明。

sentences.sentence: In suggestopedia, as he called his method, consciousness is shifted away from the curriculum to focus on something peripheral. The curriculum then becomes peripheral and is dealt with by the reserve capacity of the brain.
sentences.translation: 在他称为暗示教学法的方法中，意识从课程内容转移开，去关注外围事物。

structure.text: In suggestopedia, as he called his method
consciousness is shifted away from the curriculum
to focus on something peripheral

difficult_points: as he called his method 是插入说明。
is shifted away from 是被动结构，to focus 表目的。

sentences.sentence: The suggestopedic approach to foreign language learning provides a good illustration.
sentences.translation: 暗示教学法在外语学习中的应用提供了很好的例证。

structure.text: The suggestopedic approach to foreign language learning
provides a good illustration

difficult_points: approach to foreign language learning 是名词短语修饰语。
provide an illustration 表示提供例证。

sentences.sentence: In its most recent variant (1980), it consists of the reading of vocabulary and text while the class is listening to music.
sentences.translation: 在其最新版本（1980年）中，它包括学生在听音乐时阅读词汇和文本。

structure.text: In its most recent variant (1980)
it consists of the reading of vocabulary and text
while the class is listening to music

difficult_points: consist of 后接 reading 动名词。
while 从句表示同时发生的活动。

sentences.sentence: The first session is in two parts.
sentences.translation: 第一堂课分为两部分。

structure.text: The first session
is in two parts

difficult_points: be in two parts 表示分成两部分。
session 指一次课程。

sentences.sentence: In the first part, the music is classical (Mozart, Beethoven, Brahms) and the teacher reads the text slowly and solemnly, with attention to the dynamics of the music.
sentences.translation: 第一部分播放古典音乐，教师随着音乐的力度缓慢庄严地朗读文本。

structure.text: In the first part
the music is classical (Mozart, Beethoven, Brahms) and the teacher reads the text slowly and solemnly
with attention to the dynamics of the music

difficult_points: and 连接音乐和教师朗读两个分句。
with attention to 说明朗读配合音乐力度。

sentences.sentence: The students follow the text in their books.
sentences.translation: 学生跟着书本中的文本。

structure.text: The students
follow the text in their books

difficult_points: in their books 修饰 text。
follow the text 表示眼睛跟读。

sentences.sentence: This is followed by several minutes of silence.
sentences.translation: 随后是几分钟的静默。

structure.text: This
is followed by several minutes of silence

difficult_points: is followed by 是被动表达，this 指前面的朗读阶段。
silence 是静默状态。

sentences.sentence: In the second part, they listen to baroque music (Bach, Corelli, Handel) while the teacher reads the text in a normal speaking voice.
sentences.translation: 第二部分播放巴洛克音乐，教师用正常说话的声音朗读文本。

structure.text: In the second part
they listen to baroque music
while the teacher reads the text in a normal speaking voice

difficult_points: while 引导同时发生的教师朗读。
in a normal speaking voice 表示朗读方式。

sentences.sentence: During this time they have their books closed.
sentences.translation: 这段时间他们把书合上。

structure.text: During this time
they have their books closed

difficult_points: have + 宾语 + 过去分词表示让书处于合上的状态。
During this time 指第二部分。

sentences.sentence: During the whole of this session, their attention is passive; they listen to the music but make no attempt to learn the material.
sentences.translation: 整个课程中，他们的注意力是被动的；他们听音乐，但不试图学习材料。

structure.text: During the whole of this session
their attention is passive
they listen to the music but make no attempt to learn the material

difficult_points: 分号后解释 passive attention 的具体表现。
make no attempt to do 表示完全不尝试。

sentences.sentence: Beforehand, the students have been carefully prepared for the language learning experience.
sentences.translation: 事先，学生已为语言学习体验做好了充分准备。

structure.text: Beforehand
the students have been carefully prepared for the language learning experience

difficult_points: have been prepared 是现在完成时被动。
for the experience 表示准备的目标。

sentences.sentence: Through meeting with the staff and satisfied students they develop the expectation that learning will be easy and pleasant and that they will successfully learn several hundred words of the foreign language during the class.
sentences.translation: 通过与教职员和满意的学生见面，他们形成了这样的预期：学习会轻松愉快，并能在课堂上成功学会几百个外语词汇。

structure.text: Through meeting with the staff and satisfied students
they develop the expectation that learning will be easy and pleasant and that they will successfully learn several hundred words of the foreign language during the class
that learning will be easy and pleasant and that they will successfully learn several hundred words of the foreign language during the class

difficult_points: expectation 后两个 that 从句并列说明预期。
Through meeting 表示形成预期的方式。

sentences.sentence: In a preliminary talk, the teacher introduces them to the material to be covered, but does not 'teach' it.
sentences.translation: 在预备谈话中，教师向他们介绍将要涉及的材料，但不“教授”这些材料。

structure.text: In a preliminary talk
the teacher introduces them to the material to be covered
to be covered
but does not 'teach' it

difficult_points: to be covered 修饰 material，表示将涉及的。
does not 'teach' 省略重复主语和宾语。

sentences.sentence: Likewise, the students are instructed not to try to learn it during this introduction.
sentences.translation: 同样，学生被要求在介绍过程中不要试图学习这些材料。

structure.text: Likewise
the students are instructed not to try to learn it during this introduction

difficult_points: are instructed 是被动，not to try 是不定式否定。
it 指前句 material。

sentences.sentence: Some hours after the two-part session, there is a follow-up class at which the students are stimulated to recall the material presented.
sentences.translation: 两部分课程结束几小时后，会有一堂后续课，刺激学生回忆所呈现的材料。

structure.text: Some hours after the two-part session
there is a follow-up class
at which the students are stimulated to recall the material presented

difficult_points: there is 存在句，at which 指 follow-up class。
are stimulated to recall 是被动使役结构。

sentences.sentence: Once again the approach is indirect.
sentences.translation: 这一次方法仍然是间接的。

structure.text: Once again
the approach is indirect

difficult_points: Once again 表示与之前相同。
indirect 与前文 indirect instruction 呼应。

sentences.sentence: The students do not focus their attention on trying to remember the vocabulary, but focus on using the language to communicate (e.g. through games or improvised dramatisations).
sentences.translation: 学生不把注意力集中在努力记忆词汇上，而是集中于使用语言交流（例如通过游戏或即兴戏剧表演）。

structure.text: The students do not focus their attention on trying to remember the vocabulary
but focus on using the language to communicate
through games or improvised dramatisations

difficult_points: not...but...对比两种注意力方向。
on trying 和 on using 都是介词后动名词。

sentences.sentence: Such methods are not unusual in language teaching.
sentences.translation: 这类方法在语言教学中并不罕见。

structure.text: Such methods
are not unusual in language teaching

difficult_points: not unusual 是委婉的双重否定表达。
Such methods 指前句游戏和即兴表演。

sentences.sentence: What is distinctive in the suggestopedic method is that they are devoted entirely to assisting recall.
sentences.translation: 暗示教学法的独特之处在于，这些方法完全用于帮助回忆。

structure.text: What is distinctive in the suggestopedic method
is that they are devoted entirely to assisting recall
that they are devoted entirely to assisting recall

difficult_points: What 从句作主语，is 后接表语 that 从句。
be devoted to 后接动名词 assisting。

sentences.sentence: The 'learning' of the material is assumed to be automatic and effortless, accomplished while listening to music.
sentences.translation: 材料的“学习”被认为是自动且不费力的，在听音乐时就完成了。

structure.text: The 'learning' of the material
is assumed to be automatic and effortless
accomplished while listening to music

difficult_points: is assumed to be 是被动观点表达。
accomplished 过去分词说明学习完成的时间背景。

sentences.sentence: The teacher's task is to assist the students to apply what they have learned paraconsciously, and in doing so to make it easily accessible to consciousness.
sentences.translation: 教师的任务是帮助学生在潜意识中运用所学，并通过这样做使知识容易被意识获取。

structure.text: The teacher's task
is to assist the students to apply what they have learned paraconsciously
what they have learned
and in doing so to make it easily accessible to consciousness

difficult_points: 两个 to 不定式并列说明 task。
what 从句作 apply 的宾语，in doing so 指运用所学。

sentences.sentence: Another difference from conventional teaching is the evidence that students can regularly learn 1000 new words of a foreign language during a suggestopedic session, as well as grammar and idiom.
sentences.translation: 与传统教学的另一个区别是，有证据表明学生在一次暗示教学课中可以经常学会1000个外语新词，以及语法和习语。

structure.text: Another difference from conventional teaching
is the evidence that students can regularly learn 1000 new words of a foreign language during a suggestopedic session, as well as grammar and idiom
that students can regularly learn 1000 new words of a foreign language during a suggestopedic session, as well as grammar and idiom

difficult_points: that 从句说明 evidence 内容。
as well as 补充 grammar and idiom。

sentences.sentence: Lozanov experimented with teaching by direct suggestion during sleep, hypnosis and trance states, but found such procedures unnecessary.
sentences.translation: 洛扎诺夫尝试过在睡眠、催眠和恍惚状态下直接暗示教学，但发现这些程序并非必要。

structure.text: Lozanov experimented with teaching by direct suggestion during sleep, hypnosis and trance states
but found such procedures unnecessary

difficult_points: experiment with 表示尝试。
found + 宾语 + 形容词表示认为程序不必要。

sentences.sentence: Hypnosis, yoga, Silva mind-control, religious ceremonies and faith healing are all associated with successful suggestion, but none of their techniques seem to be essential to it.
sentences.translation: 催眠、瑜伽、席尔瓦心灵控制、宗教仪式和信仰疗愈都与成功暗示有关，但它们的技术似乎都不是暗示所必需的。

structure.text: Hypnosis, yoga, Silva mind-control, religious ceremonies and faith healing
are all associated with successful suggestion
but none of their techniques seem to be essential to it

difficult_points: 多个名词并列作主语。
none of 后接复数名词，谓语 seem；it 指 suggestion。

sentences.sentence: Such rituals may be seen as placebos.
sentences.translation: 这类仪式可以被视为安慰剂。

structure.text: Such rituals
may be seen as placebos

difficult_points: may be seen as 是情态动词加被动。
Such rituals 指前句列举的仪式。

sentences.sentence: Lozanov acknowledges that the ritual surrounding suggestion in his own system is also a placebo, but maintains that without such a placebo people are unable or afraid to tap the reserve capacity of their brains.
sentences.translation: 洛扎诺夫承认自己体系中围绕暗示的仪式也是安慰剂，但坚持认为没有这种安慰剂，人们就无法或不敢挖掘大脑的储备能力。

structure.text: Lozanov acknowledges that the ritual surrounding suggestion in his own system is also a placebo
but maintains that without such a placebo people are unable or afraid to tap the reserve capacity of their brains
surrounding suggestion in his own system
without such a placebo

difficult_points: acknowledges 和 maintains 后各接 that 从句。
without 条件说明没有安慰剂的结果。
be unable or afraid to tap 并列两个形容词。

sentences.sentence: Like any placebo, it must be dispensed with authority to be effective.
sentences.translation: 像任何安慰剂一样，它必须以权威方式施用才能有效。

structure.text: Like any placebo
it must be dispensed with authority
to be effective

difficult_points: Like 短语表示类比。
must be dispensed 是被动，to be effective 表目的或条件。

sentences.sentence: Just as a doctor calls on the full power of autocratic suggestion by insisting that the patient take precisely this white capsule precisely three times a day before meals, Lozanov is categoric in insisting that the suggestopedic session be conducted exactly in the manner designated, by trained and accredited suggestopedic teachers.
sentences.translation: 正如医生坚持要求病人每天饭前恰好三次服用这粒白色胶囊来充分发挥权威暗示的力量，洛扎诺夫也明确要求暗示教学课必须由受训并获认证的教师严格按指定方式进行。

structure.text: Just as a doctor calls on the full power of autocratic suggestion by insisting that the patient take precisely this white capsule precisely three times a day before meals
Lozanov is categoric in insisting that the suggestopedic session be conducted exactly in the manner designated, by trained and accredited suggestopedic teachers
that the suggestopedic session be conducted exactly in the manner designated
by trained and accredited suggestopedic teachers

difficult_points: Just as...主从比较结构，insisting 后接 that 从句。
insisting that session be conducted 使用虚拟语气被动。
designated 修饰 manner，by 短语说明执行者。

sentences.sentence: While suggestopedia has gained some notoriety through success in the teaching of modern languages, few teachers are able to emulate the spectacular results of Lozanov and his associates.
sentences.translation: 虽然暗示教学法因现代语言教学的成功而获得了一些名声，但很少有教师能复制洛扎诺夫及其同事的惊人结果。

structure.text: While suggestopedia has gained some notoriety through success in the teaching of modern languages
few teachers are able to emulate the spectacular results of Lozanov and his associates

difficult_points: While 引导让步从句。
be able to emulate 表示能够仿效。

sentences.sentence: We can, perhaps, attribute mediocre results to an inadequate placebo effect.
sentences.translation: 我们或许可以把平庸的结果归因于安慰剂效应不足。

structure.text: We can, perhaps, attribute mediocre results to an inadequate placebo effect

difficult_points: attribute A to B 表示把 A 归因于 B。
perhaps 是插入语，表示推测。

sentences.sentence: The students have not developed the appropriate mindset.
sentences.translation: 学生还没有形成合适的心态。

structure.text: The students
have not developed the appropriate mindset

difficult_points: 现在完成时表示至今未形成。
mindset 指学习所需的心理状态。

sentences.sentence: They are often not motivated to learn through this method.
sentences.translation: 他们通常没有动力通过这种方法学习。

structure.text: They
are often not motivated to learn through this method

difficult_points: be motivated to do 表示有动力做某事。
through this method 说明学习途径。

sentences.sentence: They do not have enough 'faith'.
sentences.translation: 他们没有足够的“信念”。

structure.text: They
do not have enough 'faith'

difficult_points: 引号表明 faith 在此是对方法的信任，而非宗教信仰。
enough 修饰 faith。

sentences.sentence: They do not see it as 'real teaching', especially as it does not seem to involve the 'work' they have learned to believe is essential to learning.
sentences.translation: 他们不把它看作“真正的教学”，尤其因为它似乎不包含他们已经相信对学习必不可少的“努力”。

structure.text: They do not see it as 'real teaching'
especially as it does not seem to involve the 'work' they have learned to believe is essential to learning
they have learned to believe is essential to learning

difficult_points: see A as B 表示把 A 看作 B。
as 引导原因，定语从句中 believe 后省略 that。
